name: Confidential Location Security Configuration for EHS
description: The Riverside Remote Pump Station 4 is an automated facility storing pressurized Chlorine gas (a highly toxic EHS). The Department of Homeland Security mandates that its storage location be marked as 'Confidential' to protect it from public records requests. A new bulk tank of Sodium Hypochlorite was also installed recently. Using the EPA Tier2 Submit application (already open), import the baseline data from C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Tasks\riverside_baseline.t2s. Open the 'Riverside Remote Pump Station 4' facility. Change its operational status to 'Unmanned' and set the Maximum Number of Occupants to 0. Then, edit the existing Chlorine (CAS 7782-50-5) entry and check the 'Confidential' flag for its storage location. Finally, add the new chemical 'Sodium Hypochlorite' (CAS 7681-52-9) as a Liquid. Set Maximum Daily Amount to 15000 lbs, Average Daily Amount to 10000 lbs, and Days On Site to 365. Add a storage location for it: Container Type 'Plastic or non-metallic drum', Ambient temperature, Ambient pressure, Location 'Outdoor Pad A'. Do NOT mark this new storage location as confidential. Save and export the completed submission file to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\riverside_secure_tier2.t2s.
